evals.prompt:
Create a corporate product manual for 'Apex Robotics'. They have provided copy and details: 
Theme: Premium dark-mode minimalist high-tech. 
Primary Color: #00f0ff (Neon Cyan). 
Secondary Color: #7000ff (Purple). 
Sections:
1. 01_cover: Title: 'Apex Vanguard X-1'. Subtitle: 'Autonomous Sentinel Systems'. Cover Image: vanguard_sentinel.jpg.
2. 02_about_us: Left Page: 'The Sentinel Vanguard' (intro text). Right Page: Features Grid (Modular Chassis, Core Intelligence, Fusion Power).
3. 03_product_specs: Left Page: Technical specifications table. Right Page: Performance analytics chart visualization (HTML SVG).
4. 99_backcover: Contact details, logo, social icons.

All page files must be saved under the respective folders. Sizing strictly 42.61cm x 29.11cm. Ensure dynamic scaling so screen view does not distort. Finally, run the build script and export a pdf.
evals.expected_output: Standard brochure directory structure created with 01_cover, 02_about_us, 03_product_specs, 99_backcover. Fully compiled dist/index.html and dist/brochure.pdf are generated. Dimensions are strictly 42.61 × 29.11 cm. High-fidelity facing pages styling is implemented with no scaling distortion on screen.
expectations: Consolidated single HTML file generated at 'dist/index.html'
The CSS contains '@page { size: 42.61cm 29.11cm; }' and is exact in sizing
Screen media preview script scaling is implemented
Facing pages layout with left-page and right-page layout is designed beautifully
